module.name: Cat Fact Finder
module.author: PythonAppFoundry
module.description: Subscribe to receive random cat facts by email every 2 hours. Enter your email to subscribe, or click "Send Now" for an immediate cat fact. Requires login. The first visitor auto-creates the "Cat Fact Subscribers" group and secures the route — subsequent users must be added to the group by an admin.

scripts.script:
import urllib.request, json CatFactConfig = DynamicModel.get_or_create('cat_fact_config', { 'email': db.String(200), }) req = urllib.request.Request( 'https://catfact.ninja/fact', headers={'User-Agent': 'PythonAppFoundry/1.0'}, ) resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10) data = json.loads(resp.read()) fact = data['fact'] row = CatFactConfig.query.first() if row and row.email: html = f'''

🐱 Cat Fact

{fact}

Sent by Cat Fact Finder

''' send_email(row.email, 'Cat Fact from PythonAppFoundry', html, html=True)
